steps.action: Run comparison and navigate to Results; click Export CSV
steps.observed: Download artifact created immediately after export click.

steps.expected: GET /api/sessions/{id}/export returns 200 text/csv with attachment filename comparison-results.csv
steps.observed: curl confirmed 200, content-type text/csv, content-disposition attachment; filename="comparison-results.csv".

assertions.title: Exported CSV contains all comparison rows (filter-independent)

steps.action: Activate Mismatches filter (1 row visible) then export
steps.expected: Export should include all classified rows, not only filtered subset
steps.observed: Export CSV contained 5 data rows while active filter showed only mismatches subset.

steps.action: Compare exported row count to summary totals
steps.observed: CSV data rows=5; summary buckets in UI also total 5.

assertions.title: Exported CSV header matches comparison setup

steps.expected: Header starts with Result and key/paired columns then trailing fixed columns
steps.observed: Header was Result, Key: id, File A: name, File A: email, File B: full_name, File B: email_address, Difference Summary, Duplicate Rows File A, Duplicate Rows File B, Duplicate Summary.

assertions.title: Exported CSV row count matches summary

steps.action: Count exported CSV rows excluding header
steps.expected: Count equals sum of summary buckets
Export control not reachable before results step
steps.observed: Initial screen exposed only file selectors; no export action present.

steps.action: Directly call export on fresh session with no comparison
steps.expected: Non-2xx with meaningful error and no download
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/64252e56-c7f4-4c79-9e91-91577bb400b3/export returned 400 with 'No comparison results to export. Run a comparison first.'

steps.action: Apply temporary in-page delay to /export fetch and click Export CSV
steps.expected: Loading state visible while export request is in-flight
steps.observed: In-flight screenshot showed loading UI (content panel hidden, only top controls visible).
Results controls returned after completion; no console errors.

steps.action: Run comparison using header-only CSV files
steps.expected: Zero-results state with all summary buckets at 0
steps.observed: Results step showed All 0 and all bucket counts 0.

steps.action: Click Save result and parse downloaded snapshot
steps.expected: Saved JSON has results=[] and all summary buckets zero
steps.observed: Downloaded snapshot had version=2, results_len=0, and every summary bucket equal to 0.

frictions.description: File upload controls are role=button dropzones; agent-browser upload requires targeting hidden input[type=file] selectors directly.
agent-browser stored downloaded artifacts with UUID filenames instead of response Content-Disposition names.
frictions.resolution: Verified expected filenames via saved curl response headers and copied artifacts to descriptive evidence filenames.

frictions.description: Export completed too quickly to reliably capture an in-flight loading frame without delay.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily delayed /export fetch in page context by 1500ms to capture loading-state evidence screenshot.

summary: Validated 7 persistence assertions (VAL-PERSIST-001, 002, 003, 004, 005, 006, 008): all passed. Export endpoint/CSV shape, row counts, empty-state inert behavior, loading-state visibility, and zero-result snapshot save behavior were confirmed with UI/network/download evidence.
